text:
うむ、よろしい！
いい出来だ！
私も若い頃は依頼されると……

よくやってくれた！
努力の賜物だな！
努力といえば、私も……

出来たか！
うむ、確かに受け取ったぞ。
私も昔は、こうして……

Wow, excellent!
Very well done!
Back in my younger days...

Well done! Looks like your hard work
paid off! Speaking of hard work... why
when I was a young lad...

You really did it?
Yes, I've got it on my end.
I still remember back in the day...

おお！　素晴らしい成果だ！
君に頼んだ甲斐があったな！
そう、私も若い頃には……

素晴らしい出来栄えだ！
頼んだかいがあった！
私もかつては……

うむ、見事！
頼んだ以上の代物だ！
まるで昔の私を……

Oh! Those are some great results, kid! Looks
like I was right to ask for your assistance.
Reminds me of when I was younger...

Excellent work there!
I was right to rely on you!
Why back in the day...

Oh, excellent! Even better than what I
asked for! Ya know, you remind me of
when I was still a young buck...
